---
title: "{{AGENT_NAME}}"
description: "{{AGENT_FOCUS}}"
date: today
author: "{{AGENT_NAME}} (c3r agent)"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Role**: {{AGENT_ROLE}}  ·  **Model**: `{{AGENT_MODEL}}`  ·  **Branch**: `agent/{{AGENT_NAME}}`

{{AGENT_FOCUS}}
:::

## Current focus

(This page is maintained by the **{{AGENT_NAME}}** agent. Append new
entries below in reverse chronological order — newest first. Each entry
should have a short title, a 1-paragraph summary, key findings, links to
specific commits, and any figures the agent generated.)

---

<!-- New entries go above this line -->
